  • Eye for detail and ability to pivot from one category of requirement to another instantaneously.
  • Demonstrate support on daily operational deliverables for multiple task types assigned to you and the team
  • Analyze root causes, identify error patterns, and propose solutions to enhance the quality of labeling tasks and their outputs.
  • Responsible for identifying day-to-day process and operational issues in Standard Operating Procedure, tools and suggest changes to unblock operations
  • Demonstrate ownership in floor support to clarify internal queries during execution on need basis


A day in the life

We are looking for a ML Data Associate (MLDA) to undertake the task of foundational labeling functions, such as dialogue evaluation on speech, text, audio, video data.

Your ability to concentrate, multi-task and your high attention to detail helps you deliver high-quality work as well as maintaining strict confidentiality and follow all applicable Amazon policies for securing confidential information. You will be a part of a diverse team with the shared vision of improving customers’ lives with practical, useful generative AI innovations. An inner drive, individuality, and a creative mind are extremely beneficial.

Basic Qualifications


  • An Associate’s Degree or related work experience
  • CEFR C1+ or equivalent fluency in Dutch language
  • Written and spoken knowledge of English is essential (CEFR C1+)
  • Strong business writing skills with ability to create reports, proposals, and professional correspondence
  • Advanced reading comprehension with ability to analyze complex business documents
  • Developed analytical thinking and structured problem-solving capabilities
  • Strong ability to interpret and implement detailed instructions across various projects
  • Proficient research skills with experience gathering and synthesizing information from multiple sources
  • Proven attention to detail in managing complex tasks and documents


Preferred Qualifications


  • Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field
  • Proven experience with demonstrated task execution ability
  • Proven capacity to leverage open-source resources effectively for comprehensive research purposes
  • Ability to adapt well to fast-paced environments with changing circumstances, direction, and strategy
  • Proven project coordination or management experience (for support functions teams)
  • Experience managing stakeholder relationships across departments
  • Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite and common business applications.


Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (

https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy_page

) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit

https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations

for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

Title: Junior Ubuntu Sportcoach | 't Gooi
Description:
De functie

Als Junior Ubuntu Sportcoach bij Ubuntu Sport zet je sport in om bewegen voor ieder kind toegankelijk en leuk te maken. Sport is voor ons het middel om ontwikkeling te stimuleren. Je werkt in een omgeving waarin sport vanzelfsprekend is en waarin jij als sportcoach echt het verschil maakt.

Van studie naar jouw eerste baan

De stap vanuit een sportieve opleiding is vaak lastig. Echte sportbanen zijn schaars en je krijgt al snel te maken met versnipperde uren, zonder duidelijke aanpak of visie. Bij Ubuntu Sport is dat anders. Je werkt vanuit één duidelijke aanpak en gedeelde visie. Wij zorgen dat jij elke dag kunt doen waar je goed in bent: werken met sport.

Jouw rol

Je geeft sport op scholen en bso’s en staat zelf voor de groep. Je werkt op meerdere locaties en bij verschillende opdrachtgevers. De ene dag start je op een school en ga je daarna door naar de bso. Wil je meer uren maken? Dan kun je dat aanvullen met andere sportactiviteiten, zoals op verenigingen, in wijken of bij bootcamps.

Jouw weekplanning

Je week is vooraf gepland en afgestemd op jouw beschikbaarheid. Je werkt op vaste momenten op scholen en bso’s en weet waar je aan toe bent. De ene dag start je op een school en ga je daarna door naar de bso, de andere dag werk je op één locatie. Wij zorgen dat je planning klopt, zodat jij je kunt focussen op jouw sportbaan.

Sport to Grow

Sport to Grow is onze eigen unieke aanpak, waarmee wij de ontwikkeling van kinderen gericht stimuleren. Sport is daarbij het middel om mensen te helpen groeien, niet het doel op zich. Vanuit een positief sportklimaat werk je aan zelfvertrouwen, sociale vaardigheden en persoonlijke ontwikkeling. Respect, veiligheid en vertrouwen vormen de basis. Vanuit daar ontstaat plezier, volgt ontwikkeling en komen prestaties vanzelf.

Toekomst & opleiding

Je begint met het geven van lessen en het begeleiden van groepen. Van daaruit kun je jaarlijks doorgroeien in salaris en verantwoordelijkheid. Op basis van je ontwikkeling pak je steeds meer op. Denk aan het organiseren van activiteiten, het begeleiden van grotere groepen, het geven van opleidingen en uiteindelijk het aansturen van andere sportcoaches.

In die ontwikkeling word je ondersteund door ons Academy team. Je volgt opleidingen en wordt onderdeel van onze opleidingspiramide, zodat je de Sport to Grow aanpak volledig in de vingers krijgt. Daarnaast word je één op één begeleid en kun je terecht bij een academy coach voor vragen, tips en praktische handvatten. Alles met als doel dat jij het verschil maakt in jouw rol, bij onze partners en voor de doelgroep.

Wat je van ons krijgt


Begeleiding en ontwikkeling Ubuntu Sport Academy: 10-20 uur per jaar
Salaris van minimaal €16,93 en maximaal €18,24 per uur, afhankelijk van jouw werkervaring
Daarbovenop ontvang je:
8% vakantiegeld
8% eindejaarsuitkering
26,5 vakantiedagen o.b.v. 36 uur per week
16 - 32 uur per week
Een VOG en EHBO-diploma
Ubuntu Sport-Kleding


Wat we minimaal vragen


Minimaal MBO 3 / 4 Sport afgerond
HBO Sportkunde net afgestudeerd
Affiniteit met sport
Werkt graag met kinderen
Mocht je twijfelen of je in aanmerking komt? Solliciteer dan gewoon, wij nemen contact met je op!

Title: ASO Specialist
Description:
About Us

At Air Apps, we believe in thinking bigger and moving faster. We’re a family-founded company on a mission to create the world’s first AI-powered Personal & Entrepreneurial Resource Planner (PRP), and we need your passion and ambition to help us change how people plan, work, and live. Born in Lisbon, Portugal in 2017 and now with offices in both Lisbon and San Francisco, we’ve remained self-funded while reaching over 100 million downloads worldwide.

Our long-term focus drives us to challenge the status quo every day, pushing the boundaries of AI-driven solutions that truly make a difference. Here, you’ll be a creative force, shaping products that empower people across the globe.

Join us on this journey to redefine resource management and change lives along the way.


This is a fully onsite position, based at our office in Lisbon, where you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams in person and contribute to a dynamic and fast-paced environment. We are open to support with relocation efforts.


About The Role

We are looking for an ASO (App Store Optimization) Specialist to join our San Francisco team. In this role, you’ll lead strategies to improve visibility, discoverability, and conversion in the Apple App Store. You’ll leverage keyword research, creative testing, and data-driven insights to drive user acquisition and retention through organic channels.

This role is perfect for someone who is passionate about mobile growth, detail-oriented, and excited to optimize across multiple apps that reach millions of users worldwide.

Responsibilities


Conduct keyword research and optimize app metadata (titles, descriptions, tags) to maximize visibility.
Develop and test creative assets (icons, screenshots, app previews, CPPs) to increase conversion rates.
Analyze app store performance metrics and provide actionable insights.
Monitor competitors and market trends to identify opportunities for growth.
Collaborate with UA, Product, and Creative teams to align ASO strategy with broader marketing initiatives.
Stay on top of platform updates, industry best practices, and emerging ASO tools.


Requirements


Around 3+ years of experience in ASO or mobile growth marketing.
Strong understanding of app store ecosystems (Apple App Store, Google Play).
Experience with ASO and analytics tools (App Annie, Sensor Tower, Data.ai, etc.).
Data-driven mindset with the ability to turn insights into action.
Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
Enthusiasm for AI, productivity, and digital tools.
Based in Lisbon (onsite role).


What benefits do we offer?


Apple hardware ecosystem for work.
Annual Bonus
Top-tier Health and Life Insurance for peace of mind.
Transportation Budget to support your commute needs.
Coverflex benefits package for meal allowances, well-being, and more.
Childcare support.
Air Conference - an opportunity to meet the team, collaborate, and grow together.
Pension Fund to support your long-term financial planning.
Urban Sports Club membership to keep you active.
Meals 100% free at the hub.


Diversity & Inclusion

At Air Apps, we are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace. We enthusiastically welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We celebrate diversity in all its forms and believe that varied voices and experiences make us stronger.

Application Disclaimer

At Air Apps, we value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants must submit their own work without any AI-generated assistance. Any use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification.

Compensation Range: $60K - $100K

Title: Product Data Analyst Intern
Description:
Job Summary

Are you ready to dive into the world of business and product information analytics and gain hands-on experience that could launch your career? We are seeking ambitious and detail-oriented PIM (Product Information Management) Intern to join our dynamic team. This internship offers an excellent opportunity to immerse yourself in our business model and product data setup, providing invaluable experience and learning opportunities, with the potential for a permanent position upon successful completion.

Key Responsibilities


Data Mastery: Assist in collecting and extracting product data from various sources, becoming proficient in handling real business data.
Quality Assurance: Perform data cleaning and preparation tasks, ensuring high data quality and integrity.
Repository Management: Support the team in maintaining and updating product data repositories, honing your organizational skills.
Visual Storytelling: Collaborate with business analysts to create compelling data visualizations and presentations.
Team Collaboration: Participate in team meetings, contributing to project discussions and gaining exposure to collaborative project work.
Dynamic Tasks: Engage in various duties as assigned by the PIM team lead, ensuring a well-rounded experience.


Qualifications


Fresh graduate or graduating student with a degree in Business, Economics, Statistics, Data Science, Computer Science, or a related field.
Strong analytical skills with the ability to collect, organize and analyze significant amounts of information with attention to detail and accuracy.
Proficiency in Microsoft Excel; experience with data analysis tools (e.g., SQL, Python) is a plus.
Basic understanding of data visualization tools (e.g., Power BI) is desirable.
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
Eagerness to learn, a proactive attitude, and a passion for product data.


What We Offer


Hands-on Experience: Work with real business data and projects, gaining practical experience that will set you apart in your career.
Mentorship: Receive guidance and mentorship from seasoned business experts, helping you grow and develop your skills.
Exposure: Gain a deep understanding of our business model and product data infrastructure.
Career Opportunities: Potential for a full-time position based on your performance and the company’s needs.
Collaborative Environment: Thrive in a supportive and inclusive work environment where your contributions are valued.
Competitive Compensation: 1000 euro compensation per month (plus travel reimbursement) based on a full-time, 40 hour, work week.


Jumpstart your career with us and embark on a journey of learning, growth, and endless possibilities. Apply today!

Looking for someone to join our team ASAP for a 5-6 month period for 32 - 40 hours per week. Must be located in the Netherlands and be available to work in the office 4-days per week.

Title: Junior Brandveiligheid Engineer
Description:
Due to the working environment and communication requirements, a high level of Dutch proficiency (minimum C1 level) is required for this position.




Als Junior Brandveiligheid Engineer bij Bluetech Engineering leer je het vak in de praktijk. Je ontwikkelt je stap voor stap tot engineer die zelfstandig ontwerpen kan maken en toetsen binnen complexe utiliteitsprojecten. Deze functie past bij jou als je techniek serieus neemt en graag begrijpt waarom een systeem werkt zoals het werkt.




Wat ga je doen?

Je start met observeren en meewerken aan lopende sprinklerprojecten. Daarna voer je eigen berekeningen uit en ontwerp je installaties in AutoCAD en Revit. Je controleert materialenlijsten, vertaalt normen naar praktische ontwerpen en ziet op locatie hoe jouw werk tot leven komt. Je werkt nauw samen met projectleiders, adviseurs en uitvoerders. Gedurende 18 maanden bouw je laag voor laag aan je kennis, inzicht en zelfstandigheid.




Jouw taken als Junior Brandveiligheid Engineer:

Tekenen van sprinklerinstallaties in AutoCAD en Revit
Uitvoeren van eerste hydraulische berekeningen
Opstellen van nauwkeurige materialenlijsten en schema’s
Meelopen op locaties en verifiëren dat ontwerpen correct worden uitgevoerd
Afstemmen met projectleiders, adviseurs en uitvoerders




Wat jij meebrengt

MBO 4- of HBO-diploma in werktuigbouwkunde, installatietechniek, mechatronica of vergelijkbaar
Nieuwsgierigheid naar Brandveiligheid en doorzettingsvermogen om het vak te leren
Nuchter en gestructureerd denken, verantwoordelijkheid nemen
Lef om door te vragen en scherp te blijven
Rijbewijs B




Wat jij van ons krijgt

Een functie waarin je inhoudelijk serieus werk doet
€3.100 bruto per maand (40 uur, incl. ADV, excl. vakantiegeld)
Direct uitzicht op een vast contract
Een compleet Brandveiligheid traineeship richting volwaardig Sprinkler Engineer
Persoonlijke coaching door jouw Talent Manager
Opleidingen en trainingen via de Bluetech Academy
Projectgebonden auto (privégebruik in overleg)
27 vakantiedagen
Toegang tot de Bluetech Community: kennisdagen, events en bijeenkomsten




Waarom Bluetech Engineering?

Personal, Optimistic, Winning, Educating en Reliable, kortom: POWER! Dit is de kern van Bluetech Engineering. Wij zijn de thuisbasis voor technici. Onze Bluetechers werken aan de mooiste projecten van Nederland en leveren altijd kwaliteit.




Bij Bluetech Engineering combineer je als junior leren en werken in één compleet traject. Je ontwikkelt je technische vaardigheden door praktijkervaring op te doen bij echte projecten en door gericht te worden opgeleid. Zo krijg je alles wat je nodig hebt om snel te groeien in je carrière.




Ben jij een starter en op zoek naar een vliegende start? Bekijk onze junior vacatures en ontdek hoe je bij ons snel kunt groeien, persoonlijk en professioneel. Met de begeleiding van ervaren Bluetechers krijg je alle tools en kennis om het beste uit jezelf te halen.




Enthousiast geworden?

Wil je inhoudelijk verder praten over deze junior rol en de projecten waar je aan kunt werken? Dan maken we graag kennis met je.

Title: AI Data Associate with Dutch, Artificial General Intelligence Data Services - Amazon Development Center (Netherlands) B.V.
Description:
AI is the most transformational technology of our time, capable of tackling some of humanity’s most challenging problems. Amazon is investing in generative AI and the responsible development and deployment of large language models (LLMs) across all of our businesses. Come build the future of human-technology interaction with us.

We are looking for those candidates who just don’t think out of the box, but make the box they are in ‘Bigger’. The future is now, do you want to be a part of it? Then read on!

Key job responsibilities



Maintain and follow strict confidentiality as customer privacy is our most important tenet
Work with a range of different types of data including, but not limited to: text, speech, audio, image, and video
Deliver high-quality labelled data, using guidelines provided to meet our KPIs and using in-house tools and software, as part of Amazon's commitment to developing and deploying AI responsibly.
Demonstrate proficiency in generating high quality human insight data across a range of modalities, inclusive of text, image video and audio.
Capable of making sound judgments and logical decisions when faced with ambiguous or incomplete information while performing tasks.
Eye for detail and ability to pivot from one category of requirement to another instantaneously.
Demonstrate support on daily operational deliverables for multiple task types assigned to you and the team
Analyze root causes, identify error patterns, and propose solutions to enhance the quality of labeling tasks and their outputs.
Responsible for identifying day-to-day process and operational issues in Standard Operating Procedure, tools and suggest changes to unblock operations
Demonstrate ownership in floor support to clarify internal queries during execution on need basis



A day in the life

We are looking for a Data Entry Clerks to undertake the task of foundational labeling functions, such as dialogue evaluation on speech, text, audio, video data.

Your ability to concentrate, multi-task and your high attention to detail helps you deliver high-quality work as well as maintaining strict confidentiality and follow all applicable Amazon policies for securing confidential information. You will be a part of a diverse team with the shared vision of improving customers’ lives with practical, useful generative AI innovations. An inner drive, individuality, and a creative mind are extremely beneficial.

Basic Qualifications



An Associate’s Degree or related work experience
CEFR C1+ or equivalent fluency in Dutch language
Written and spoken knowledge of English is essential (CEFR C1+)
Strong business writing skills with ability to create reports, proposals, and professional correspondence
Advanced reading comprehension with ability to analyze complex business documents



Preferred Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field
Proven experience with demonstrated task execution ability
Proven capacity to leverage open-source resources effectively for comprehensive research purposes



Amazon is an equal opportunities employer. We believe passionately that employing a diverse workforce is central to our success. We make recruiting decisions based on your experience and skills. We value your passion to discover, invent, simplify and build. Protecting your privacy and the security of your data is a longstanding top priority for Amazon. Please consult our Privacy Notice (

https://www.amazon.jobs/en/privacy_page

) to know more about how we collect, use and transfer the personal data of our candidates.

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit

https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how-we-hire/accommodations

for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

Title: Computer Science talent (werkstudent of deeltijd starter)
Description:
Bij Blackbirds werk je aan slimme AI-oplossingen die besluitvorming verbeteren. Als specialist help je met het bouwen en toepassen van AI-modellen, het analyseren van data en het vertalen van businessvragen naar oplossingen. Met deze oplossingen spelen we in op uitdagingen en kansen bij onze klanten om operationele processen en werkzaamheden te verbeteren. Wanneer je niet op klantprojecten werkt, bouw je aan een eigen AI-project dat waarde toevoegt aan Blackbirds.




In samenwerking met je leidinggevende (Head of AI & Product) stem je jouw vaste werkdagen af op je studie. Je werkt vanuit het Blackbirds kantoor in Rotterdam samen met een groeiend team van >10 slimme, ambitieuze en creatieve ontwikkelaars en andere ondersteunende collega's aan nieuwe proposities en projecten bij onze klanten. 




We werken voor toonaangevende klanten binnen o.a. zorg, overheid, technologie en finance. Onze huidige oplossingen richten zich op het verbeteren van compliancy, automatiseren van werkprocessen in tot standkoming van documenten, complexe planningsuitdagingen en demand forecasting.




Verantwoordelijkheden
Meebouwen van slimme applicaties, waar ook AI een belangrijke rol heeft
Valideren van analyses en modeloutput
Ontwikkelen van demo's en prototypes
Bouwen van applicaties voor onze klanten




Skills
Python, pandas, scikit-learn, Claude, Github Co-pilot of vergelijkbaar
Werken binnen Azure omgeving
Front-end design
Affiniteit met AI, data science en besluitvorming
Nieuwsgierig, scherp en oplossingsgericht
Nederlands op professioneel niveau (spreken, lezen, schrijven)




Ervaring

Studieprojecten of eigen experimenten met ML of AI tellen mee




Opleidingseisen

Je bent student of afgestudeerd in Computer Science of vergelijkbaar




We bieden
Een goed salaris
Een prachtige werkplek
Uitgebreide lunch en gezonde snacks voor tussendoor
Kans om naast je studie veel ervaring te doen binnen een moderne op AI-oplossingen gerichte omgeving

Title: Machine Operator Eindhoven
Description:
Samenvatting

Do you like working with machines in a modern production environment? Are you technically minded and ready for a stable job with great pay and career opportunities? Start as a Machine Operator in Eindhoven and help keep production running smoothly. Good work!

Over de functie

As a Machine Operator, you play an important role in the production process. Your tasks include:



Operating and monitoring production machines
Solving machine malfunctions and troubleshooting technical issues
Performing product changes (such as mold changes)
Carrying out daily production quality checks
Working according to quality and safety regulations
Following Health & Safety and Food Safety guidelines
Joining daily shift meetings with the Shift Leader



You will be working in a 5-shift rotation system:



You will work in a rotating 2-2-2 schedule (6 days):
2 morning shifts (06:00 – 14:00)
2 afternoon shifts (14:00 – 22:00)
2 night shifts (22:00 – 06:00)
Followed by 4 days off



Over het bedrijf

You will join an innovative and informal production company in Eindhoven that specializes in high-quality tobacco products.

What you can expect:



A supportive and energetic team
A modern production environment
Plenty of opportunities to learn and grow
Space for your own ideas and initiative



Wat wij vragen



Experience as a Machine Operator
Technical insight and problem-solving skills
Good communication skills in Dutch or English
Basic knowledge of Word and Excel
Own transportation (bike, scooter, or car)
7 days availability for rotating shifts



We value not only your experience, but also your motivation, personality, and ideas. Show us what makes you unique.

Wat wij bieden



Salary between €22.60 and €25.00 gross per hour
Travel allowance of €0.23 per km
Annual bonus
25 vacation days
Holiday allowance
Overtime pay of 150% to 200%
Temporary contract with the possibility of a permanent position



Meer informatie

Are you interested in this vacancy Machine Operator in Eindhoven? You can apply within 2 minutes.

Do you have some questions first? Youri answers them via +31630902433 and y.dewinter@carriere.com. Good work!

Title: Process Engineer PCBA
Description:
Functieomschrijving

Wil jij werken aan hightech elektronica en productieprocessen continu verbeteren? Als Process Engineer PCBA ben je verantwoordelijk voor het optimaliseren van productieprocessen rondom PCBA's binnen een innovatieve hightech omgeving. Je speelt een belangrijke rol in het verbeteren van kwaliteit, efficiëntie en maakbaarheid.




Wat ga je doen?

Je optimaliseert productieprocessen binnen de PCBA-omgeving
Je analyseert verstoringen en implementeert structurele verbeteringen
Je ondersteunt introducties van nieuwe producten binnen productie
Je werkt aan yield verbetering en processtabiliteit
Je voert root cause analyses uit en lost procesproblemen op
Je werkt samen met engineering, quality en productie
Je borgt verbeteringen binnen processen en werkinstructies




Jouw profiel

Je hebt een Bachelor of Master in Elektrotechniek, Electronica, Mechatronica of vergelijkbaar
Je hebt ervaring binnen een productie omgeving
Je hebt ervaring met process improvement en lean manufacturing
Je bent analytisch sterk en werkt gestructureerd
Je communiceert makkelijk met verschillende afdelingen




Interesse?

Solliciteer dan direct!

Kijk voor meer vacatures op www.uptec.nl

Title: Junior Data Analist
HTML:
ErasmusTalent.nl is een online vacatureplatform voor Studenten, Trainees, Junior & Medior Professionals op HBO/WO-niveau met 0-5 jaar ervaring.


Voor onze Partner Veneficus zoeken wij een Junior Data Analist met interesse in Data en IT.


Kickstart jouw carrière als Data Analist – word trainee bij VF Talent Academy!

📍 Locatie: Randstad | Vast contract | €2.600 p/m | Hybride werken

Ben jij (bijna) klaar met je studie en zie je jezelf puzzelen met data, slimme oplossingen bedenken en écht impact maken met jouw analytische skills? Dan hebben wij dé springplank voor jouw carrière.


Bij VF Talent Academy word jij in één jaar klaargestoomd tot volwaardig Data Analist. Hoe? Met een stevig traineeship waarin jouw groei centraal staat. Denk: leren van toptrainers, coaching op maat, soft skill weekends én direct aan de slag bij een toffe opdrachtgever. Jij leert. Jij groeit. Jij maakt verschil.


Wat ga je doen?

  • Je start met een intensieve bootcamp vol technische en persoonlijke trainingen;
  • Daarna draai je mee bij een opdrachtgever als volwaardig Data Analist;
  • Je wordt continu begeleid door een Learning Consultant en een Personal Coach;
  • Je werkt aan echte vraagstukken, in een echte werkomgeving, met echte impact;
  • Is er na een jaar nog steeds een klik? Dan kun je direct in dienst treden bij de opdrachtgever.


Jij bent...

  • (Bijna) afgestudeerd aan een hbo- of wo-opleiding, liefst in een bèta richting;
  • Nieuwsgierig, analytisch en hebt al wat geproefd van Python, R of Matlab;
  • Niet bang om in het diepe te springen;
  • Flexibel en woonachtig in (of bereid te verhuizen naar) de Randstad;
  • Op zoek naar een plek waar je kunt groeien, leren én plezier maken.


Wat krijg je van ons?

  • Een vast contract vanaf dag 1 (ja, écht);
  • €2.600 bruto p/m + vakantiegeld, thuiswerkvergoeding, bonusregeling én pensioen;
  • Een NS-Businesscard, Swapfiets & laptop;
  • Een ontwikkelpad dat jouw technische én persoonlijke skills versterkt;
  • Werken waar jij wil: hybride of zelfs remote;
  • Regelmatige borrels, terugkomdagen en een team dat altijd voor je klaarstaat;
  • Én: een vrijwilligersdag waarop jij iets goeds doet voor een ander.


Wie zijn wij?

Veneficus. Optimizing Intelligence.

Wij maken bedrijven slimmer met data en helpen beslissers het verschil te maken. En dat begint bij mensen zoals jij. Ambitieus, analytisch, leergierig – klaar om impact te maken.


Klaar voor een carrière in data?

Kijk hier voor een uitgebreid vacatureprofiel en om direct te solliciteren: Junior Data Analist


Op zoek naar meer uitdagende vacatures? Bekijk ze op www.erasmustalent.nl/vacatures!


Solliciteren via ErasmusTalent:

1️⃣ Vul je gegevens in en solliciteer via ons platform.

2️⃣ Het bedrijf laat je snel weten of je door bent.

3️⃣ Niet geselecteerd? Geen zorgen! We helpen je graag verder.

Title: Business Development Rep (AI Cloud)
Description:
About Featherless

Featherless.ai is building the world’s most reliable open-model inference platform — a serverless foundation for deploying and scaling AI without infrastructure overhead.

Backed by AMD, Airbus Ventures, 500 Global, Kickstart Ventures, HF0 Residency, Panache Ventures, and Oakseed Ventures, we’re a well-funded team of researchers and engineers on a mission to democratize AI through performance and accessibility.

Our cloud provides instant access to 30,000+ open-source AI models and the research innovations powering next-generation efficiency, reliability, and model optimization.

About The Role

We’re looking for an experienced Business Development Representative (AI Cloud) — someone technical that thrives at the intersection of AI, communication, and execution.

This is not a traditional sales role. You’re expected to be fluent in AI and be able to hold your own in conversations with model creators, AI startups, enterprises, and developers exploring open-model deployment.

If you're a charismatic developer looking to expand into sales we want to speak to you.

What You’ll Own Immediately


Build & qualify pipeline across enterprises and AI startups
Manage inbound requests through chat and email
Manage outreach sequences and automations (HubSpot, Clay, Reply.io, n8n)
Re-engage existing sign-ups and subscribers; identify high-value users
Coordinate partner calls & discovery meetings with the CRO and founders
Track CRM, pipeline metrics, and weekly reporting
Attend events to generate pipeline and establish key relationships
Propose creative GTM experiments and new partnership opportunities


What You Bring


1–3 years in Cloud Infrastructure Sales or Developer Relations
Comfortable engaging technical audiences (developers, founders, researchers)
AI power user
Excellent written and verbal communication in english — concise, credible, human
Entrepreneurial and self-driven — you operate independently and get things done
Familiar with HubSpot, Clay, n8n, or similar tools
Bonus: Fluent in French or German


Why Featherless


Work directly with exec on high-impact partnerships and GTM strategy
Build your network across one of the fastest-growing open AI ecosystems
Be part of a small, high-performing team making open weight AI accessible to everyone

Title: Junior Ubuntu Sportcoach | Amersfoort
Description:
De functie

Als Junior Ubuntu Sportcoach bij Ubuntu Sport zet je sport in om bewegen voor ieder kind toegankelijk en leuk te maken. Sport is voor ons het middel om ontwikkeling te stimuleren. Je werkt in een omgeving waarin sport vanzelfsprekend is en waarin jij als sportcoach echt het verschil maakt.

Van studie naar jouw eerste baan

De stap vanuit een sportieve opleiding is vaak lastig. Echte sportbanen zijn schaars en je krijgt al snel te maken met versnipperde uren, zonder duidelijke aanpak of visie. Bij Ubuntu Sport is dat anders. Je werkt vanuit één duidelijke aanpak en gedeelde visie. Wij zorgen dat jij elke dag kunt doen waar je goed in bent: werken met sport.

Jouw rol

Je geeft sport op scholen en bso’s en staat zelf voor de groep. Je werkt op meerdere locaties en bij verschillende opdrachtgevers. De ene dag start je op een school en ga je daarna door naar de bso. Wil je meer uren maken? Dan kun je dat aanvullen met andere sportactiviteiten, zoals op verenigingen, in wijken of bij bootcamps.

Jouw weekplanning

Je week is vooraf gepland en afgestemd op jouw beschikbaarheid. Je werkt op vaste momenten op scholen en bso’s en weet waar je aan toe bent. De ene dag start je op een school en ga je daarna door naar de bso, de andere dag werk je op één locatie. Wij zorgen dat je planning klopt, zodat jij je kunt focussen op jouw sportbaan.

Sport to Grow

Sport to Grow is onze eigen unieke aanpak, waarmee wij de ontwikkeling van kinderen gericht stimuleren. Sport is daarbij het middel om mensen te helpen groeien, niet het doel op zich. Vanuit een positief sportklimaat werk je aan zelfvertrouwen, sociale vaardigheden en persoonlijke ontwikkeling. Respect, veiligheid en vertrouwen vormen de basis. Vanuit daar ontstaat plezier, volgt ontwikkeling en komen prestaties vanzelf.

Toekomst & opleiding

Je begint met het geven van lessen en het begeleiden van groepen. Van daaruit kun je jaarlijks doorgroeien in salaris en verantwoordelijkheid. Op basis van je ontwikkeling pak je steeds meer op. Denk aan het organiseren van activiteiten, het begeleiden van grotere groepen, het geven van opleidingen en uiteindelijk het aansturen van andere sportcoaches.

In die ontwikkeling word je ondersteund door ons Academy team. Je volgt opleidingen en wordt onderdeel van onze opleidingspiramide, zodat je de Sport to Grow aanpak volledig in de vingers krijgt. Daarnaast word je één op één begeleid en kun je terecht bij een academy coach voor vragen, tips en praktische handvatten. Alles met als doel dat jij het verschil maakt in jouw rol, bij onze partners en voor de doelgroep.

Wat je van ons krijgt


Begeleiding en ontwikkeling Ubuntu Sport Academy: 10-20 uur per jaar
Salaris van minimaal €16,93 en maximaal €18,24 per uur, afhankelijk van jouw werkervaring
Daarbovenop ontvang je:
8% vakantiegeld
8% eindejaarsuitkering
26,5 vakantiedagen o.b.v. 36 uur per week
16 - 32 uur per week
Een VOG en EHBO-diploma
Ubuntu Sport-Kleding


Wat we minimaal vragen

Show more
HTML:
De functie

Als Junior Ubuntu Sportcoach bij Ubuntu Sport zet je sport in om bewegen voor ieder kind toegankelijk en leuk te maken. Sport is voor ons het middel om ontwikkeling te stimuleren. Je werkt in een omgeving waarin sport vanzelfsprekend is en waarin jij als sportcoach echt het verschil maakt.

Van studie naar jouw eerste baan

De stap vanuit een sportieve opleiding is vaak lastig. Echte sportbanen zijn schaars en je krijgt al snel te maken met versnipperde uren, zonder duidelijke aanpak of visie. Bij Ubuntu Sport is dat anders. Je werkt vanuit één duidelijke aanpak en gedeelde visie. Wij zorgen dat jij elke dag kunt doen waar je goed in bent: werken met sport.

Jouw rol

Je geeft sport op scholen en bso’s en staat zelf voor de groep. Je werkt op meerdere locaties en bij verschillende opdrachtgevers. De ene dag start je op een school en ga je daarna door naar de bso. Wil je meer uren maken? Dan kun je dat aanvullen met andere sportactiviteiten, zoals op verenigingen, in wijken of bij bootcamps.

Jouw weekplanning

Je week is vooraf gepland en afgestemd op jouw beschikbaarheid. Je werkt op vaste momenten op scholen en bso’s en weet waar je aan toe bent. De ene dag start je op een school en ga je daarna door naar de bso, de andere dag werk je op één locatie. Wij zorgen dat je planning klopt, zodat jij je kunt focussen op jouw sportbaan.

Sport to Grow

Sport to Grow is onze eigen unieke aanpak, waarmee wij de ontwikkeling van kinderen gericht stimuleren. Sport is daarbij het middel om mensen te helpen groeien, niet het doel op zich. Vanuit een positief sportklimaat werk je aan zelfvertrouwen, sociale vaardigheden en persoonlijke ontwikkeling. Respect, veiligheid en vertrouwen vormen de basis. Vanuit daar ontstaat plezier, volgt ontwikkeling en komen prestaties vanzelf.

Toekomst & opleiding

Je begint met het geven van lessen en het begeleiden van groepen. Van daaruit kun je jaarlijks doorgroeien in salaris en verantwoordelijkheid. Op basis van je ontwikkeling pak je steeds meer op. Denk aan het organiseren van activiteiten, het begeleiden van grotere groepen, het geven van opleidingen en uiteindelijk het aansturen van andere sportcoaches.

In die ontwikkeling word je ondersteund door ons Academy team. Je volgt opleidingen en wordt onderdeel van onze opleidingspiramide, zodat je de Sport to Grow aanpak volledig in de vingers krijgt. Daarnaast word je één op één begeleid en kun je terecht bij een academy coach voor vragen, tips en praktische handvatten. Alles met als doel dat jij het verschil maakt in jouw rol, bij onze partners en voor de doelgroep.

Wat je van ons krijgt

  • Begeleiding en ontwikkeling Ubuntu Sport Academy: 10-20 uur per jaar
  • Salaris van minimaal €16,93 en maximaal €18,24 per uur, afhankelijk van jouw werkervaring
  • Daarbovenop ontvang je:
    • 8% vakantiegeld
    • 8% eindejaarsuitkering
    • 26,5 vakantiedagen o.b.v. 36 uur per week
  • 16 - 32 uur per week
  • Een VOG en EHBO-diploma
  • Ubuntu Sport-Kleding

Wat we minimaal vragen

  • Minimaal MBO 3 / 4 Sport afgerond
  • HBO Sportkunde net afgestudeerd
  • Affiniteit met sport
  • Werkt graag met kinderen

Title: Senior Manager, GTM Analytics & Planning
Description:
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for a Senior Manager, GTM Analytics & Planning in Netherlands.

Step into a high-impact leadership role at the intersection of revenue strategy, analytics, and operational excellence within a globally distributed and innovation-driven environment. This position offers the opportunity to shape how go-to-market performance is measured, optimized, and scaled across international sales organizations. You will lead strategic analytics initiatives that directly influence forecasting accuracy, revenue growth, and operational efficiency while partnering closely with senior commercial leadership. The role combines hands-on technical expertise with strategic planning, enabling you to build scalable data frameworks and predictive models that support business expansion. Working in a fully remote and asynchronous culture, you’ll collaborate with cross-functional teams worldwide while mentoring analytics professionals and driving data governance initiatives. This is an ideal opportunity for a commercially minded analytics leader who thrives in fast-paced SaaS environments and enjoys transforming complex data into actionable business decisions.

Accountabilities


Lead the execution and evolution of GTM analytics and planning strategies to support a global multi-segment sales organization.
Build and maintain scalable data models, dashboards, and reporting frameworks that serve as the central source of truth for revenue operations.
Oversee sales performance measurement, including analysis of win rates, sales cycles, churn risk, funnel efficiency, and revenue forecasting.
Drive annual and quarterly GTM planning initiatives, including territory planning, quota setting, headcount modeling, and capacity forecasting.
Partner with Marketing Analytics and Revenue Operations teams to create unified end-to-end visibility across the customer acquisition funnel.
Develop predictive models and analytical frameworks to support proactive decision-making and revenue pacing adjustments.
Ensure high standards of data governance, integrity, and operational consistency across commercial reporting systems.
Collaborate with executive stakeholders to translate complex analytical insights into strategic recommendations and actionable business narratives.
Mentor and manage a team of GTM analysts, fostering technical excellence, collaboration, and continuous improvement.
Identify opportunities to leverage AI and automation tools to optimize GTM workflows, sales intelligence, and operational processes.


Requirements


Significant experience in Revenue Operations, Sales Analytics, Business Intelligence, or related functions within high-growth B2B SaaS organizations.
Proven expertise in GTM planning processes, including quota modeling, sales capacity planning, territory management, and forecasting.
Strong technical proficiency with Snowflake, dbt, SQL, and BI platforms such as Tableau or Sigma.
Experience using Python or R for advanced modeling, statistical analysis, and forecasting initiatives.
Deep understanding of Salesforce CRM and full-funnel sales processes, including SDR/BDR, partnerships, and account management lifecycles.
Experience leveraging AI and automation tools to improve analytics, lead routing, workflow efficiency, or commercial operations.
Strong analytical mindset with expertise in regression analysis, trend forecasting, and sales performance modeling.
Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills, with the ability to present executive-level insights clearly and effectively.
Leadership experience managing and mentoring analytics or RevOps teams in fast-paced and globally distributed environments.
Fluent English communication skills, both written and verbal.
Ability to thrive in asynchronous remote work settings with a proactive, action-oriented approach.


Benefits


Fully remote work environment with the flexibility to work from anywhere.
Flexible working hours within an asynchronous work culture that supports work-life balance.
Competitive compensation package with globally equitable salary practices.
Stock options and performance-focused growth opportunities.
Flexible paid time off policy.
16 weeks of paid parental leave.
Mental health and wellness support services.
Dedicated learning and professional development budget.
Home office budget and company-provided IT equipment.
Budget for coworking spaces and local in-person social events.
Opportunity to work with globally distributed teams across multiple continents in an innovative SaaS environment.


How Jobgether Works

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

Why Apply Through Jobgether?

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer (m/f/d)
Description:
Our Company

WE ARE AGAIN AWARDED AS TOP ARBEITGEBER 2025!

At AP Sensing, we’re building on a success story that began in the garage of Bill Hewlett and Dave Packard. As an independent HP spin-off, we combine over 40 years of technological expertise with a passion for innovation.

Together we’ll continue to enhance infrastructure, protect people, and safeguard our planet. With a commitment to fiber optic sensing, we value every voice and empower growth. Join us in thinking ahead to create a smarter, safer world.




YOUR NEW CAREER

As part of AP Sensing, you will immerse yourself in a fascinating world: Together we take measurement technology to the limits of physics. We use fiber optic cables as sensors and build measuring devices and software that measure temperatures and acoustic signals along the fiber with meter precision.




Your Responsibilities

Turn machine learning proof of concepts into robust products for real-time analysis of measurements on edge devices and backend systems.
Lead the design and implementation of scalable ML pipelines and data processing components for the analysis of high-volume sensor data and drive engineering best practices in the team.
Build and maintain CI/CD workflows and automated tests for ML applications, ensuring reliability and reproducibility.
Collaborate closely with data scientists, platform engineers, data engineers, and domain experts to shape system architecture and ensure ML solutions integrate cleanly into the overall product landscape.




Your Profile

You hold a technical degree in computer science, machine learning, or a related field, or you bring equivalent practical experience.
You have 5+ years of professional experience in software engineering or ML engineering, including experience with production ML or other data-intensive systems.
You have excellent programming skills in Python and write structured, maintainable, and efficient code.
You have advanced programming skills in at least one statically typed language (e.g., C++, Rust, Go, Java).
You have a deep understanding of the MLOps lifecycle, including data and model versioning, deployment, monitoring, and continuous improvement.
You are experienced with containers (Docker) and CI/CD pipelines and apply modern testing practices to ML-driven systems.
Ideally, you have experience with operating ML-based applications in production, including monitoring model quality, drift detection, and incident handling.
Ideally, you have worked with real-time or near-real-time applications, streaming data, or IoT scenarios and understand the constraints of edge deployments.




Our Offer

half-yearly bonus distribution (depending on company performance)
annual salary increases
holiday bonus
christmas bonus
AP Sensing Card with 50 Euro credit per month
permanent employment contract with job security
company pension scheme
participation in the Corporate Benefits Program
meal subsidy for in-house canteen
free drinks and fresh fruit
job-bike offer
career opportunities due to steady, healthy company growth
flat hierarchies and very collegial relationship with managers
very positive and appreciative working atmosphere
international and intercultural team
flexible working hours and home office options
company laptop for everyone
ideal work-life balance
regular company and team events
employee training and education
new and fully equipped kitchen with high-tech coffee machine
kiosk in the building
large, bright and air-conditioned offices
modern office equipment with creative spaces
height-adjustable desks for ergonomic working
2 minutes to the S-Bahn and motorway
free parking spaces
sports facilities: weekly fitness coach
showers available (for cyclists or "lunch break joggers")




Are you ready to play a BIG role in a small team instead of a SMALL role in a big team?

Then you are spot-on with us…

Title: Praktikum Data Science
Description:
Wir als Team


sind der Innovationspool für die Validierung der V/H-& Energiesysteme. Wir haben ein offenes Mindset für neue Konzepte und Technologien und führen das Prototyping von Ideen durch. Bei uns erwartet Dich ein vielfältiges und breites Spektrum an Themen.


Was erwartet dich?

Deine Themenschwerpunkte sind...


Arbeit an aktuellen Herausforderungen von datenbasierten Funktionen, Methoden und Prozessen
Validierung von Konzepten
Arbeiten an innovativen Funktionen
Mitentwicklung und -umsetzung von Artificial Intelligence & Data- und Process Analytics (z.B. Process Mining)
Anwendung fortgeschrittener Data Science Methoden (Datenaufbereitung, -strukturierung -bereitstellung und -visualisierung) auf Realdaten aus dem Prüfstand
Planung, Durchführung und Nachbereitung von Versuchen und Erprobungsfahrten zur Validierung und Datengenerierung
Implementierung von neuronalen Netzwerken und Machine Learning Verfahren


Beginn: ab sofort

Dauer: 3 bis 6 Monate

Wir bieten dir...


Anwendung fortgeschrittener Data Science Methoden (Datenaufbereitung, -strukturierung -bereitstellung und -visualisierung) auf Realdaten aus dem Prüfstand
Unterstützung bei der Planung, Durchführung und Nachbereitung von Versuchen zur Validierung und Datengenerierung
Implementierung von LLM Agenten und Machine Learning Verfahren
Digitale Lern- und Arbeitsmittel
Mobiles Lernen nach Abstimmung im Team
Eine aktive Prakti-Community


Was zeichnet dich aus?


Ein Studienplatz für Mathematik, Elektrotechnik, Computer Science, Informatik oder eines vergleichbaren Studiengangs mit Schwerpunkt Data Analytics, Machine Learning oder Robotics (mindestens im 3. Semester oder im Gap Year zwischen Bachelor und Master)
Ein sicherer Umgang mit Python
Erfahrung im Umgang mit Methoden und Werkzeugen für Data Analytics und Machine Learning Anwendungen sowie ausgewählter Frameworks (z.B. PyTorch, TensorFlow, scikit-learn)
Kenntnisse von Versionierungstools für die Softwareentwicklung wünschenswert
Erste Kenntnisse von Big Data- und Cloud-Anwendungen (Datenmanagement, -prozessierung, -visualisierung; z.B. Grafana, Jupyter) von Vorteil
Eine selbstständige und strukturierte Arbeitsweise
Spaß am Arbeiten im Team
Sehr gute Deutsch- und gute Englischkenntnisse (min. B2)


Du hast noch Fragen?

Uns erreichen regelmäßig Fragen rund um die Bewerbung bei Porsche. Hier findest du schon mal die wichtigsten Infos.

Bitte beachte, dass du dich lediglich auf eine Praktikantenstelle bewerben kannst. Weitere Bewerbungseingänge können leider nicht berücksichtigt werden, sofern bereits eine aktive Bewerbung vorliegt. Aber vermerke gerne im Anschreiben, falls dich weitere Stellen interessieren.

Sobald du eine passende Stelle gefunden hast, fülle unser Online-Bewerbungsformular aus und füge am Ende deine vollständigen Bewerbungsdokumente hinzu (Anschreiben, Lebenslauf, Arbeits- und (Hoch-)Schulzeugnissen sowie ggf. weiteren Bescheinigungen). Bitte habe Verständnis, dass wir keine Bewerbungen per Post oder E-Mail entgegennehmen.

Wir begrüßen ausdrücklich die Bewerbung von Menschen mit Behinderung, deren Integration uns ein besonderes Anliegen ist.

Bewerberinnen und Bewerber aus dem europäischen Wirtschaftsraum, die sich für ein Praktikum in Deutschland bewerben, benötigen einen Personalausweis oder Pass. Bewerberinnen und Bewerber, die nicht aus dem europäischen Wirtschaftsraum stammen benötigen für die Dauer des Praktikums eine Aufenthalts- und ggf. eine Arbeitserlaubnis.

Weitere Informationen zur Bewerbung bei Porsche findest du hier.

Wir als Unternehmen

„Am Anfang schaute ich mich um, konnte aber den Wagen, von dem ich träumte, nicht finden. Also beschloss ich, ihn mir selbst zu bauen.“ Dieser Satz von Ferry Porsche bringt alles auf den Punkt, was Porsche ausmacht. Mitarbeiter, die so denken, stoßen bei uns immer auf offene Türen. Porsche ist eine wertvolle Marke mit weltweiter Anziehungskraft und einer treuen Kundenbasis rund um den Globus.

Die Art und Weise, wie wir bei Porsche zusammenarbeiten und als Team zusammenhalten ist einzigartig. Unser Miteinander ist dabei durch unsere starke Porsche Kultur geprägt: Herzblut | Sportlichkeit | Pioniergeist | Eine Familie

Wir bei Porsche leben Vielfalt, setzen uns für Chancengleichheit ein und fördern aktiv ein inklusives Miteinander. Ebenso sind Respekt und Toleranz fest verankert in unserer Unternehmenskultur. So schaffen wir ein Umfeld, das die Individualität jedes einzelnen Menschen im Unternehmensinteresse fördert.

Ein Schlüssel zu unserem Erfolg ist die Vielfalt an Perspektiven. Denn die sich daraus ergebende Kombination individueller Stärken und Erfahrungen treibt Innovationen voran und stärkt unsere Teams. Dazu haben wir uns auch durch Unterzeichnung der Charta der Vielfalt verpflichtet. Ganz nach dem Motto: Jeder einzigartig. Zusammen vielfältig. Gemeinsam erfolgreich.

Unsere Standorte im Detail inklusive Anfahrt und Detailbeschreibung.

Unsere Kulturwerte prägen täglich die Zusammenarbeit im Team und unseren Umgang miteinander.

Title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer - Stuttgart Area - 90k
Description:
Senior Machine Learning Engineer - Stuttgart Area - 90k




As a Senior Machine Learning Engineer, you will be part of a global team developing distributed sensing solutions that help optimize critical infrastructure, protect people, and safeguard the environment. Using advanced sensing technologies combined with machine learning, the team delivers reliable real-time insights across assets such as pipelines, power cables, and railway systems.




In this role, you will contribute to solutions deployed worldwide, working in a collaborative, cross-disciplinary engineering environment that values technical rigor, long-term quality, and practical innovation.




Your Responsibilities

Turn machine learning proof-of-concepts into robust, production-ready systems for real-time analysis on edge devices and backend platforms
Lead the design and implementation of scalable ML pipelines and data processing components for high-volume sensor data
Drive engineering best practices within the team
Build and maintain CI/CD workflows and automated testing for ML applications, ensuring reliability and reproducibility
Collaborate closely with data scientists, platform engineers, data engineers, and domain experts to shape system architecture and integrate ML solutions into the overall product landscape




Your Profile

Degree in computer science, machine learning, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience
5+ years of professional experience in software engineering or ML engineering, including production ML or data-intensive systems
Strong programming skills in Python, with the ability to write structured, maintainable, and efficient code
Advanced programming skills in at least one statically typed language (e.g., C++, Rust, Go, or Java)
Deep understanding of the MLOps lifecycle, including data and model versioning, deployment, monitoring, and continuous improvement
Experience with containerization (e.g., Docker) and CI/CD pipelines, along with modern testing practices




Nice to have:

Experience operating ML systems in production, including monitoring model performance, drift detection, and incident handling
Experience with real-time or near-real-time systems, streaming data, or IoT environments, including edge deployment constraints




What’s Offered

Challenging and impactful work using state-of-the-art technology
Open, collaborative, and respectful working environment
International, team-oriented culture
Competitive compensation and benefits, including flexible working hours
Opportunities for personal development, career growth, and performance-based incentives

Title: Masterarbeit "KI in der Ladefunktionsentwicklung"
Description:
AufgabenAufgaben

Zu deinen Aufgaben gehören die Analyse bestehender Entwicklungsprozesse in der Ladefunktionssoftware sowie die Identifikation von Potenzialen für den KI-gestützten Einsatz – etwa in den Bereichen automatisierte Anforderungsanalyse, domänenspezifische Codegenerierung oder intelligente Testfallableitung. Du konzipierst und implementierst einen prototypischen Ansatz, evaluierst dessen Leistungsfähigkeit anhand praxisnaher Metriken und leitest Handlungsempfehlungen für den produktiven Einsatz ab.

Die Arbeit umfasst dabei typischerweise folgende Schwerpunkte:


Literaturrecherche zu KI-Methoden in der automobilen Softwareentwicklung (u. a. LLMs, RAG, Fine-Tuning, Multi-Agenten-Systeme)
Analyse domänenspezifischer Anforderungen an Ladefunktionen (z. B. ISO 15118, IEC 61851, OBC-/DC-Ladefunktionen)
Entwicklung und Evaluation eines KI-gestützten Werkzeugs oder Workflows (z. B. Softwareassistent, Code-Generierungspipeline, Testfallgenerator)
Validierung anhand realer oder repräsentativer Entwicklungsartefakte
Dokumentation und Aufbereitung der Ergebnisse in Form einer wissenschaftlichen Arbeit


Du arbeitest in einem interdisziplinären Forschungsumfeld mit engem Praxisbezug zur industriellen Ladefunktionsentwicklung und hast die Möglichkeit, deine Ergebnisse in wissenschaftliche Publikationen einfließen zu lassen.

AnforderungenAnforderungen

Studiengänge:


Informatik
Fahrzeugtechnik
Maschinenbau
Elektrotechnik
Data Science oder vergleichbarer Studiengang


Studienschwerpunkte:


Softwareentwicklung und Programmierung
Künstliche Intelligenz und Machine Learining
Systems Engineering
Data Science


Fachkenntnisse:


Grundlagen des Machine Learnings
Verständnis der Prinzipien des Systems-Engineering
Erfahrung in der Datenaufbereitung
Erste Erfahrung in der Automobilindustrie (z.B. druch Praktika) wünschenswert


IT-Kenntnisse:


Sicherer Umgang mit MS Office
Idealerweise fundierte Kenntnisse in Python
Machine Learning und KI-Frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow)


Soft Skills:


Hohe Eigeninitiative
ausgeprägte analytische Fähigkeiten
strukturierte Arbeitsweise
Teamfähigkeit
Zielorientierung


UnternehmensprofilUnternehmensprofil

„Am Anfang schaute ich mich um, konnte aber den Wagen, von dem ich träumte, nicht finden. Also beschloss ich, ihn mir selbst zu bauen.“

Dieser Satz von Ferry Porsche bringt alles auf den Punkt, was Porsche ausmacht. Als Marke, als Unternehmen, als Automobilhersteller, als Arbeitgeber. Die „Idee Porsche“ hat so einzigartige Sportwagen wie den Porsche 356 oder den 911 hervorgebracht. Durch die Kombination von Tradition und Innovation mit den Porsche typischen, manchmal etwas unkonventionellen Denkweisen unserer Mitarbeiter, lassen wir automobile Träume wahr werden und haben so immer das „Etwas-mehr“ im Blick. Porsche ist allerdings viel mehr als "nur" ein exklusiver Sportwagenhersteller. Denn auch als Arbeitgeber hat Porsche viel zu bieten: vielfältige Einstiegs- und Karrieremöglichkeiten, Maßnahmen zur Vereinbarkeit von Beruf und Familie sowie flexible Arbeitszeitmodelle.

Exklusive Einblicke hinter die KulissenExklusive Einblicke hinter die Kulissen

Unabhängig von dem, was andere tun, sind wir stets bestrebt, unsere Grenzen ständig neu zu definieren und Maßstäbe zu setzen. Das können wir heute und in Zukunft aber nur mit Mitarbeitern und Führungskräften erreichen, die immer das „Etwas-mehr“ im Blick haben.

bestehend aus hochmotivierten, agilen Menschen arbeiten an den Herausforderungen von datenbasierten Funktionen, Methoden und Prozessen die in verschiedenen Unternehmensbereichen zum Einsatz kommen. Title: Research scientist with focus on HPC, AI, and training (f/m/d) HLRS_15_2026
Company: SimTech - Cluster of Excellence | University of Stuttgart
Description:
Magazin Job anbieten

Jobs Events Alumni Career Service Magazin

Research scientist with focus on HPC, AI, and training (f/m/d) HLRS_15_2026 - Stuttgart

Höchstleistungsrechenzentrum Stuttgart

Raum Stuttgart

Dein Job

The High-Performance Computing Center Stuttgart (HLRS), established in 1996, is the first national supercomputing center in Germany. It operates one of Europe's most powerful supercomputers and provides state-of-the-art HPC services to academic users and industry. HLRS holds a worldwide leading position in the research areas of parallel programming, numerical methods for HPC, visualization, cloud computing concepts, high-performance data analytics (HPDA), and artificial intelligence. HLRS is also significantly involved in international and national research projects.

Through our department "Training and Scalable Algorithms" (TASC), HLRS offers a comprehensive range of training courses in the fields of HPC, AI, and related technologies. The courses are targeted at scientists and experts from the university environment, from research institutions, as well as from industry and small and medium-sized enterprises. TASC further develops HLRS’s courses by integrating new topics such as artificial intelligence, hardware accelerators, and quantum computing.

In the department TASC, we are currently looking for a

Research scientist with focus on HPC, AI, and training

(f/m/d) (100%, TV-L 13)

HLRS_15_2026

You will support our team in consolidating the HLRS’s training concept within the project bwHPC-S5 (Scientific Simulation and Storage Support Services). You will also contribute to the EU project GreenShift – EU MSc in AI & HPC for Green Digital Innovation in Transport. The European transport sector faces an urgent need for green transformation to meet sustainability and emission reduction targets. GreenShift will equip R&D and product design professionals with practical skills to harness the power of AI and HPC to fast-track the development of innovative new products and solutions for the transport industry. GreenShift will drive transformative innovation in the European Transport Sector.

HLRS Training

https://www.hlrs.de/training

BwHPC-S5

https://www.hlrs.de/projects/detail/bwhpc-s5

GreenShift

https://www.hlrs.de/projects/detail/greenshift

Your Main Tasks In The Projects


Achieve the strategic goals of the state Baden-Württemberg in training on HPC and Data Intensive Computing, (after a successful transitional phase) by leading the training work package of the bwHPC-S5 project.
Design the curriculum for and deliver the online EU Master’s in AI & HPC for Green Digital Innovation in Transport.
Complement the Master’s programme with e.g., workshops, lectures and networking events.
Develop resources to train lecturers and faculty, ensuring a consistent and high-quality delivery of the Master’s programme.
Assist in the promotion of GreenShift, highlighting its transformative benefits for transport innovation, SMEs and industry stakeholders.


Your further tasks as a member of TASC at HLRS:


Autonomous research in the areas of HPC and AI: Big data analytics, artificial intelligence, emerging computer architectures and domain-specific technologies.
Developing new courses and modules that represent the current state of research.
Teaching and support of participants in our courses.


Your Qualifications


You have successfully completed a university degree (MSc or PhD or equivalent) in the areas of engineering, natural sciences, mathematics, computer science, or a comparable qualification with a technical focus.
You have very good programming skills in at least one established high-level language (e.g., Python, C/C++, Fortran, Julia).
You have relevant experience in designing and conducting workshops or tutorials.
You can prove experience in coordination and organisation, such as project management or working in a (research) project.
You have very good communication skills also towards large audiences and external partners. You enjoy interacting with people.
You are proficient in both German and English, written and spoken. Working proficiency in German is a must for your daily work in bwHPC-S5.


Ideally, Your Profile Is Supplemented By


Experience with AI frameworks, workloads (e.g. Natural Language Processing), and libraries (e.g., PyTorch or JAX).
Experience with parallel programming paradigms.
Some background in the field of (green) transport (e.g., fleet optimisation, energy-efficient logistics, smart city planning).
Experience in writing project proposals.


The position is available starting at the earliest possible date. Employment in this position has to comply with the legal regulations and is limited to the duration of the projects, until September 30th 2029. Salary for this position is based on TV-L 13.

HLRS is committed to supporting and retaining talented people even at the conclusion of projects, when possible: Before the project ends, HLRS might examine what possibilities might exist for a contract extension, based on funding that is available at that time and in accordance with the legal regulations.

Are you interested?

Then we are looking forward to receiving your application!

Your application should include a cover letter, your CV, your university degrees and relevant employers’ references.

Please send your application preferably by e-mail (as one PDF file) with the subject "HLRS_15_2026" to: bewerbungen@hlrs.de by June 14th, 2026.

For questions regarding the content of the job posting, please contact Dr.-Ing. Lorenzo Zanon via courses@hlrs.de .

In an effort to strengthen the presence of female workers in the scientific areas, the University of Stuttgart invites women to apply for this job opening. Full-time positions may in general be turned into part-time positions. Disabled people will have priority as long as they are equally qualified. The recruitment process will be handled by the central administration of the University of Stuttgart. Information on the handling of applicant data in accordance with Art. 13 DS-GVO can be found at: https://www.uni-stuttgart.de/en/privacy-notice/job-application/.

Title: Praktikum Prozessmanagement Produktion: Data Science & Reporting
Description:
Wir als Team


fertigen nicht nur die Karossen für den legendären 911 und den innovativen Taycan, sondern verleihen ihnen durch die individuelle Lackierung einen einzigartigen Charakter. Mit modernster Technologie und hohem Automatisierungsgrad meistern wir täglich vielfältige und anspruchsvolle Aufgaben – flexibel, engagiert und mit Leidenschaft. Dabei verbindet uns nicht nur das Ziel, die besten Sportwagen der Welt zu bauen, sondern auch ein starkes Miteinander, das jeden Tag zu etwas Besonderem macht. Werde Teil unseres großartigen Teams und gestalte mit uns die Zukunft von Porsche!


Was erwartet dich?

Deine Themenschwerpunkte sind...


Aufbereitung, Analyse und Visualisierung von Daten
Erstellung und Pflege von Power BI Dashboards
Automatisierung von Berichten und Datenprozessen
Zusammenarbeit mit verschiedenen Fachbereichen zur Dateninterpretation


Beginn: März/April & September/Oktober

Dauer: 5 bis 6 Monate

Wir bieten dir...


Persönliche Betreuung und fachliche Unterstützung
Möglichkeit, eigene Ideen einzubringen und umzusetzen
Digitale Lern- und Arbeitsmittel
Flexible Arbeitszeiten und mobiles Lernen nach Abstimmung im Team
Eine aktive Prakti-Community


Was zeichnet dich aus?


Ein Studienplatz für Wirtschaftsinformatik, Data Science, BWL oder eines vergleichbaren Studiengangs (mindestens im 3. Semester oder im Gap Year zwischen Bachelor und Master)
Gute Kenntnisse in Power BI und Microsoft Excel
Erste Erfahrung mit Datenanalyse und Visualisierung
Eine selbstständige und strukturierte Arbeitsweise
Teamfähigkeit


Du hast noch Fragen?

Uns erreichen regelmäßig Fragen rund um die Bewerbung bei Porsche. Hier findest du schon mal die wichtigsten Infos.

Bitte beachte, dass du dich lediglich auf eine Praktikantenstelle bewerben kannst. Weitere Bewerbungseingänge können leider nicht berücksichtigt werden, sofern bereits eine aktive Bewerbung vorliegt. Aber vermerke gerne im Anschreiben, falls dich weitere Stellen interessieren.

Sobald du eine passende Stelle gefunden hast, fülle unser Online-Bewerbungsformular aus und füge am Ende deine vollständigen Bewerbungsdokumente hinzu (Anschreiben, Lebenslauf, Arbeits- und (Hoch-)Schulzeugnissen sowie ggf. weiteren Bescheinigungen). Bitte habe Verständnis, dass wir keine Bewerbungen per Post oder E-Mail entgegennehmen.

Wir begrüßen ausdrücklich die Bewerbung von Menschen mit Behinderung, deren Integration uns ein besonderes Anliegen ist.

Bewerberinnen und Bewerber aus dem europäischen Wirtschaftsraum, die sich für ein Praktikum in Deutschland bewerben, benötigen einen Personalausweis oder Pass. Bewerberinnen und Bewerber, die nicht aus dem europäischen Wirtschaftsraum stammen benötigen für die Dauer des Praktikums eine Aufenthalts- und ggf. eine Arbeitserlaubnis.

Weitere Informationen zur Bewerbung bei Porsche findest du hier.

Wir als Unternehmen

„Am Anfang schaute ich mich um, konnte aber den Wagen, von dem ich träumte, nicht finden. Also beschloss ich, ihn mir selbst zu bauen.“ Dieser Satz von Ferry Porsche bringt alles auf den Punkt, was Porsche ausmacht. Mitarbeiter, die so denken, stoßen bei uns immer auf offene Türen. Porsche ist eine wertvolle Marke mit weltweiter Anziehungskraft und einer treuen Kundenbasis rund um den Globus.

Die Art und Weise, wie wir bei Porsche zusammenarbeiten und als Team zusammenhalten ist einzigartig. Unser Miteinander ist dabei durch unsere starke Porsche Kultur geprägt: Herzblut | Sportlichkeit | Pioniergeist | Eine Familie

Wir bei Porsche leben Vielfalt, setzen uns für Chancengleichheit ein und fördern aktiv ein inklusives Miteinander. Ebenso sind Respekt und Toleranz fest verankert in unserer Unternehmenskultur. So schaffen wir ein Umfeld, das die Individualität jedes einzelnen Menschen im Unternehmensinteresse fördert.

Ein Schlüssel zu unserem Erfolg ist die Vielfalt an Perspektiven. Denn die sich daraus ergebende Kombination individueller Stärken und Erfahrungen treibt Innovationen voran und stärkt unsere Teams. Dazu haben wir uns auch durch Unterzeichnung der Charta der Vielfalt verpflichtet. Ganz nach dem Motto: Jeder einzigartig. Zusammen vielfältig. Gemeinsam erfolgreich.

Title: Machine Learning Software Engineer
Description:
About Applied Intuition

Applied Intuition, Inc. is powering the future of physical AI. Founded in 2017 and now valued at $15 billion, the Silicon Valley company is creating the digital infrastructure needed to bring intelligence to every moving machine on the planet. Applied Intuition services the automotive, defense, trucking, construction, mining and agriculture industries in three core areas: tools and infrastructure, operating systems, and autonomy. Eighteen of the top 20 global automakers, as well as the United States military and its allies, trust the company’s solutions to deliver physical intelligence. Applied Intuition is headquartered in Sunnyvale, California, with offices in Washington, D.C.; San Diego; Ft. Walton Beach, Florida; Ann Arbor, Michigan; London; Stuttgart; Munich; Stockholm; Bangalore; Seoul; and Tokyo. Learn more at applied.co.

We are an in-office company, and our expectation is that employees primarily work from their Applied Intuition office 5 days a week. However, we also recognize the importance of flexibility and trust our employees to manage their schedules responsibly. This may include occasional remote work, starting the day with morning meetings from home before heading to the office, or leaving earlier when needed to accommodate family commitments.

About The Role

We are looking for software engineers with expertise in ML-first perception, prediction or planning for autonomous vehicles or mobile robots. Your contributions will focus on building out key ML capabilities of an autonomous vehicle stack.

In addition to your engineering contributions, by working in our dynamic and customer-focused team culture, you will contribute to and learn from best practices in the autonomy industry. We move fast and focus on excellence, for our products and for our business. If you are hands-on and looking for a place to have a multiplying effect on making autonomous systems a reality, Applied Intuition is the place for you!

At Applied Intuition, you will:


Design and implement capabilities and workflows for cutting-edge real-world perception or planning/prediction systems
Leverage established products at Applied Intuition to build the software and infrastructure foundation for our ML developments


We're looking for someone who has:


Experience with the end-to-end development cycle of deep learning models
Expertise in subdomains such as modeling, input pipelines, evaluation, deployment, and model optimization
3+ years of experience building production software using modern software practices
Fluency in C++, or fluency in Python with intermediate experience in C++
Deep understanding of the concepts and methods behind any frameworks or libraries that they worked with
Experience working with production level ML and DL perception algorithms for autonomous vehicles


Nice to have:


MSc or PhD in machine learning, ideally applied to perception, prediction,planning or closely related field
Experience building and shipping software frameworks or tools
Experience with driver assistance or autonomous driving systems
Experience in evaluating and improving system-in-the-loop model performance
Deep hands-on expertise in relevant algorithms or methods, such as non-linear optimization, computational geometry, numerical analysis, or distributed systems


Benefits and perks


Lunch and dinner allowance
Fitness (600 USD) and learning stipends (1,000 USD) annually
Stock options


Don’t meet every single requirement? If you’re excited about this role but your past experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyway. You may be just the right candidate for this or other roles.

Applied Intuition is an equal opportunity employer and federal contractor or subcontractor. Consequently, the parties agree that, as applicable, they will abide by the requirements of 41 CFR 60-1.4(a), 41 CFR 60-300.5(a) and 41 CFR 60-741.5(a) and that these laws are incorporated herein by reference. These regulations prohibit discrimination against qualified individuals based on their status as protected veterans or individuals with disabilities, and prohibit discrimination against all individuals based on their race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or national origin. HTML:
About Applied Intuition

Applied Intuition, Inc. is powering the future of physical AI. Founded in 2017 and now valued at $15 billion, the Silicon Valley company is creating the digital infrastructure needed to bring intelligence to every moving machine on the planet. Applied Intuition services the automotive, defense, trucking, construction, mining and agriculture industries in three core areas: tools and infrastructure, operating systems, and autonomy. Eighteen of the top 20 global automakers, as well as the United States military and its allies, trust the company’s solutions to deliver physical intelligence. Applied Intuition is headquartered in Sunnyvale, California, with offices in Washington, D.C.; San Diego; Ft. Walton Beach, Florida; Ann Arbor, Michigan; London; Stuttgart; Munich; Stockholm; Bangalore; Seoul; and Tokyo. Learn more at applied.co.

We are an in-office company, and our expectation is that employees primarily work from their Applied Intuition office 5 days a week. However, we also recognize the importance of flexibility and trust our employees to manage their schedules responsibly. This may include occasional remote work, starting the day with morning meetings from home before heading to the office, or leaving earlier when needed to accommodate family commitments.

About The Role

We are looking for software engineers with expertise in ML-first perception, prediction or planning for autonomous vehicles or mobile robots. Your contributions will focus on building out key ML capabilities of an autonomous vehicle stack.

In addition to your engineering contributions, by working in our dynamic and customer-focused team culture, you will contribute to and learn from best practices in the autonomy industry. We move fast and focus on excellence, for our products and for our business. If you are hands-on and looking for a place to have a multiplying effect on making autonomous systems a reality, Applied Intuition is the place for you!

At Applied Intuition, you will:

  • Design and implement capabilities and workflows for cutting-edge real-world perception or planning/prediction systems
  • Leverage established products at Applied Intuition to build the software and infrastructure foundation for our ML developments

We're looking for someone who has:

  • Experience with the end-to-end development cycle of deep learning models
  • Expertise in subdomains such as modeling, input pipelines, evaluation, deployment, and model optimization
  • 3+ years of experience building production software using modern software practices
  • Fluency in C++, or fluency in Python with intermediate experience in C++
  • Deep understanding of the concepts and methods behind any frameworks or libraries that they worked with
  • Experience working with production level ML and DL perception algorithms for autonomous vehicles

Nice to have:

  • MSc or PhD in machine learning, ideally applied to perception, prediction,planning or closely related field
  • Experience building and shipping software frameworks or tools
  • Experience with driver assistance or autonomous driving systems
  • Experience in evaluating and improving system-in-the-loop model performance
  • Deep hands-on expertise in relevant algorithms or methods, such as non-linear optimization, computational geometry, numerical analysis, or distributed systems

Benefits and perks

  • Lunch and dinner allowance
  • Fitness (600 USD) and learning stipends (1,000 USD) annually
  • Stock options

Don’t meet every single requirement? If you’re excited about this role but your past experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyway. You may be just the right candidate for this or other roles.

Applied Intuition is an equal opportunity employer and federal contractor or subcontractor. These regulations require that covered prime contractors and subcontractors take affirmative action to employ and advance in employment individuals without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, protected veteran status or disability.
